---
id: delete-task
title: "Delete a task"
description: "Soft-deletes a task (status = deleted). Deleted tasks are inactive and skipped during execution but retained for audit purposes."
sidebar_label: "Delete a task"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: docs/api-reference/generated/memintel-app-developer-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as=&#123;"h1"&#125;
  className=&#123;"openapi__heading"&#125;
  children=&#123;"Delete a task"&#125;
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method=&#123;"delete"&#125;
  path=&#123;"/tasks/&#123;id&#125;"&#125;
  context=&#123;"endpoint"&#125;
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Soft-deletes a task (status = deleted). Deleted tasks are inactive and skipped during execution but retained for audit purposes.

  as=&#123;"h2"&#125;
